task: Find the cheapest used Honda Civic that meets all the following criteria: under $25,000, fewer than 30,000 miles, includes Apple CarPlay, adaptive cruise control, and blind-spot sensors.
final_result_response:
Now I have the complete picture. I can see the quick filter tags confirm "Under 40,000 miles (1)" and "Under 50,000 miles (2)" — but there is NO "Under 30,000 miles" tag at all, confirming zero cars exist under 30k miles with all required features.

Based on my thorough search on Carvana, here is my finding:

**There are currently no Honda Civics on Carvana that meet ALL five criteria simultaneously:**
- Under $25,000 ✓
- Fewer than 30,000 miles ✗ (no matches)
- Apple CarPlay ✓
- Adaptive Cruise Control ✓
- Blind-spot Sensors ✓

When I applied all filters together (Under $25,000 + Under 30,000 miles + Honda Civic + Apple CarPlay + Adaptive Cruise Control + Blindspot Sensors), the result was **0 cars**.

**The issue:** Cars under 30,000 miles with Apple CarPlay and Adaptive Cruise Control (6 cars found) do NOT have blind-spot sensors. Cars with all three tech features (Apple CarPlay + Adaptive Cruise Control + Blind-spot Sensors) under $25,000 (9 cars found) all have over 40,000 miles — the lowest being 40k miles on a 2018 Honda Civic Touring at $23,990.

**Cheapest with all features except mileage:** 2018 Honda Civic EX w/Honda Sensing or 2019 Honda Civic EX, both at **$18,590** (but with 79k and 85k miles respectively).

**Closest overall match:** 2018 Honda Civic Touring at **$23,990** with ~40k miles — it has all required features but exceeds the 30,000-mile limit by about 10,000 miles.
